01004.name: Agnes Baker
01004.text:
[reaction] After 1 or more horror is placed on Agnes Baker: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. (Limit once per phase.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each horror on Agnes Baker.

01058.name: Forbidden Knowledge
01058.text:
Uses (4 secrets). If Forbidden Knowledge has no secrets, discard it.
[fast] Exhaust Forbidden Knowledge and take 1 horror: Move 1 secret from Forbidden Knowledge to your resource pool, as a resource.

01060.name: Shrivelling
01060.text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat] and deals +1 damage. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, take 1 horror.

01062.name: Arcane Studies
01062.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test.

01063.name: Arcane Initiate
01063.text: Forced - After Arcane Initiate enters play: Place 1 doom on it. [fast] Exhaust Arcane Initiate: Search the top 3 cards of your deck for a [[Spell]] card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

01064.name: Drawn to the Flame
01064.text: Draw the top card of the encounter deck. Then, discover 2 clues at your location.

01067.name: Fearless
01067.text: If this skill test is successful, heal 1 horror.

01074.name: Baseball Bat
01074.text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If a [skull] or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, discard Baseball Bat after the attack resolves.

01076.name: Stray Cat
01076.text: [fast] Discard Stray Cat: Automatically evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.

01086.name: Knife
01086.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Knife: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

01087.name: Flashlight
01087.text: Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. Your location gets -2 shroud for this investigation.

01091.name: Overpower
01091.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01104.name: The Gathering
01104.text:
Easy / Standard
[skull] -X. X is the number of [[Ghoul]] enemies at your location.
[cultist] -1. If you fail, take 1 horror.
[tablet] -2. If there is a [[Ghoul]] enemy at your location, take 1 damage.

01107.name: They're Getting Out!
01107.text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Each unengaged [[Ghoul]] enemy moves 1 location towards the Parlor. Forced - At the end of the round: Place 1 doom on this agenda for each [[Ghoul]] enemy in the Hallway or Parlor.

01109.name: The Barrier
01109.text: Objective - When the round ends, investigators in the hallway may, as a group, spend the requisite number of clues to advance.

01114.name: Cellar
01114.text: Forced - After you enter the Cellar: Take 1 damage.

01115.name: Parlor
01115.text: [action] Resign. "This is too much for me!" You run out the front door, fleeing in panic. While Lita Chantler is not controlled by a player, she gains: "[action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4). If you succeed, take control of Lita Chantler."

01163.name: Rotting Remains
01163.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror.

01164.name: Frozen in Fear
01164.text: Revelation - Put Frozen in Fear into play in your threat area. The first time you perform one of the following actions (move, fight, or evade) each round, it costs 1 additional action. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Frozen in Fear.

01165.name: Dissonant Voices
01165.text: Revelation - Put Dissonant Voices into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or events. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Dissonant Voices.

01166.name: Ancient Evils
01166.text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

01167.name: Crypt Chill
01167.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose and discard 1 asset you control (if you cannot, take 2 damage instead).

01168.name: Obscuring Fog
01168.text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Attached location gets +2 shroud. Forced - After attached location is successfully investigated: Discard Obscuring Fog.

01174.name: Locked Door
01174.text: Revelation - Attach to the location in play with the most clues, and without a Locked Door attached. The attached location cannot be investigated. [action]: Test [combat] (4) to break down the door or [agility] (4) to pick the lock. If you succeed, discard Locked Door.

50012.name: Mysterious Gateway
50012.text: Objective - Only investigators in the Guest Hall may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

50013.name: Study
50013.text:
[action] [action]: Draw 3 cards. Only the lead investigator can activate this ability.
Forced - When an enemy attempts to spawn at a location that is not in play: Put that location into play and spawn that enemy there.

50014.name: Guest Hall
50014.text: Investigators in this location cannot take draw actions.

50015.name: Bedroom
50015.text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating the Bedroom: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

50016.name: Bathroom
50016.text: Forced - After you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [auto_fail] symbol while investigating the Bathroom: Lose all remaining actions and end your turn.

50017.name: Hallway
50017.text: Forced - After you reveal this location: Put the set-aside Attic, Cellar, and Parlor locations into play.

50018.name: Attic
50018.text: Forced - After you reveal the Attic: Put the set-aside Far Above Your House location into play.

50019.name: Field of Graves
50019.text: Forced - After you reveal Field of Graves: Test [willpower] (4). For each point you fail by, discard 1 card at random from each player's hand.

50038.name: Grave-Eater
50038.text: Forced - After Grave-Eater attacks you: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

50039.name: Acolyte of Umôrdhoth
50039.text:
Prey - Fewest cards in hand.
While engaged with an investigator with no cards in his or her hand, Acolyte of Umôrdhoth cannot be evaded.
